name: Three Cliffs Bay via Pennard
highlights: Postcard view of Three Cliffs Bay with castle ruins on sand dunes.
points_of_interest: Pennard Castle (13th C ruin); Parc le Breos Neolithic burial chamber
viewpoints: Classic Three Cliffs Bay view from the ridge
picnic_spots: Top of the dunes with castle view
parking_start: Southgate NT car park or Parkmill
food_drink_nearby: Three Cliffs Coffee Shop; Parkmill Gower Inn
hazards_notes: Tide can cut off Three Cliffs sands
